decisions.rationale: ai_RNbBHXjm lives on MilestoneCard (JOURNAL-05 target), not in JOURNAL-06 ui_refs or target_files. IR workflow places delete on edit-milestone-delete-btn (ai_RNbBHXmU) inside EditMilestonePopup; routing the card trash icon through onEditMilestone matches AC-3 and criteria_audit evidence. EditMilestonePopup delete path is implemented. Remaining gap is misleading aria-label 'Edit milestone options' on ai_RNbBHXjm — a11y polish on the card component, not a popup AC failure. Defer aria-label / distinct affordance polish to a journal UX backlog wave (or a small JOURNAL-05 card touch-up) without blocking JOURNAL-07 depends_on gate.

EditMilestonePopup handleDelete calls deleteMilestone immediately; functional_audit FV-4 passes and AC-2 requires delete to remove the row and refresh the grid — no confirmation step in decompose ACs or Bubble ui_refs. AlertDialog on journal entry delete is a brownfield SPA pattern, not an IR-mandated milestone workflow. One-click delete with toast feedback is acceptable for this item; add confirmation as optional UX hardening in a later polish wave.

IR re-read confirms ai_RNbBHXlj and ai_RNbBHXlk carry text_expressions with host_class render_prop — dynamic Bubble bindings, not static presentation.text literals extractable from inventory. JOURNAL-06 ui_refs scope form fields and CTAs inside ai_RNbBHXlf/ai_RNbBHXmC, not header copy entities. AddMilestonePopup already mounts data-bubble-id on ai_RNbBHXlj/ai_RNbBHXlk with appropriate style_ref classes; React-authored titles are reasonable placeholders until render_prop expressions are resolved from drsam-99657.bubble in a dedicated copy-parity pass.

summary: Review passed at 100% coverage with 0 blockers. Triage: 0 fix_now, 2 defer, 1 accept. Deferred: C-1 → journal UX backlog (MilestoneCard ai_RNbBHXjm aria-label polish, outside JOURNAL-06 ui_refs); C-2 → optional delete-confirmation polish (not in AC-2). Accepted: C-3 (dynamic text_expressions on header copy; data-bubble-id markers present). ok_to_advance=true, rewrite_required=false.
